title: ophrys × cosentiana nothosubsp. nociana
intro: Ophrys × cosentiana nothosubsp. nociana, also known as the Mediterranean Bee Orchid, is a type of orchid hybrid that belongs to the Ophrys genus. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ophrys × cosentiana nothosubsp. nociana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
